winner: I tried to put a new clothe on the horse to make it look fancy, but every time I tried to shake it, it just turned into a neigh-robe.

candidates.text: I tried to put a new clothe on the horse to make it look fancy, but every time I tried to shake it, it just turned into a neigh-robe.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative wordplay with 'neigh-robe' combining 'neigh' and 'robe,' satisfying both required words naturally and humorously."}

candidates.text: I tried to shake off my fear, but it turned out I just needed to clothe myself in courage — turns out, fear doesn't like fashion either.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative use of required words, surprising twist with fashion, concise and natural humor."}

candidates.text: I tried to start a fashion line for ghosts, but it failed because they refused to clothe themselves and would only shake things up.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Creative use of required words, concise, surprising twist with ghost humor"}

candidates.text: I asked my tailor to make me a garment that could withstand an earthquake, but he just told me he could only clothe me in a shake.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses both required words and has a play on 'shake' (earthquake) and 'clothe,' but the pun is somewhat forced and the setup could be more engaging."}

candidates.text: I tried to shake out my clothe, but it turned out I was just shaking out a suit that had already been worn by someone else's laundry.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses both required words and has a mild twist, but the setup is slightly convoluted and the humor is underdeveloped."}

candidates.text: I tried to shake off my embarrassment, but I couldn't clothe it properly.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses the required words and has a mild play on words, but the humor is weak and the surprise factor is low."}

candidates.text: Why did the man bring a pair of clothes to the bar? He wanted to *shake* up his style with some *clothing* choices!
I shook hands with the guy at the store today, and then I clothe-d it right back up.
I went to a store and asked for clothes to shake my hand with. The salesperson looked at me like I was crazy, but honestly, I just wanted something soft to grip while making an entrance.
